nasb.text: They spent the night around the house of God, because the watch was committed to them; and they were in charge of opening it morning by morning.

esv.text: And they lodged around the house of God, for on them lay the duty of watching, and they had charge of opening it every morning.

cnv.text: 他們在　神的殿的四周住宿，因為他們承擔看守的責任，並且每天早晨要負責開門。

ccb.text: 他们住在殿周围负责看殿，每天早晨开门。
